calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-07-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Mark Rennie, Esq. for Plaintiff: Richard Peter, also present, was sworn and examined.
Mr. Rennie motion to Amend the Defendant's name to: Bauer's Limousine Services, granted as to proof.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant: Bauer's Limosine Services, as follows:
Damages $102,843.64
Prejudgment Interest $8,377.53
Attorney's Fees $1,517.50
Costs $542.50, for a total of $113,281.17
Counsel to prepare Judgment along with a conforming copy of the filed Dismissal as to Defendant: Bauer's Transportation.
